customer360.title: Customer 360
customer360.subtitle: Customer overview and activity

INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.title: Increase activity cadence
INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.reason: Only 2 activities in the last 7 days.

explain.revenueQualityTitle: Revenue quality scores are rule-based and calculated from the last 12 months of order/quotation/activity data, covering cohort, retention, RFM, LTV, churn, upsell and payment metrics.
explain.churnRisk: Churn Risk is calculated between 0-100 using last order recency, last activity recency, and 12-month order frequency signals. Higher score means higher loss risk.
explain.upsellPropensity: Upsell Propensity is scored 0-100 from order count, quotation-to-order conversion, and average order amount signals. Higher score indicates stronger upsell opportunity.
explain.paymentBehavior: Payment Behavior is currently a proxy score (order continuity, quotation rejection rate, last-order recency) instead of direct ERP collection history, calculated 0-100.
explain.rfmSegment: RFM Segment assigns Champions/Loyal/AtRisk/Potential based on recency, frequency, and monetary rules.
explain.cohortRetentionTitle: Cohort Retention uses first touch/order month as cohort; if there is an order in following months, it counts as retained and produces monthly retention percentage.
explain.recommendedActionsTitle: Recommended Actions are priority follow-up suggestions produced by the rules engine (e.g. no activity for a long time, there is an open offer, churn is high). Each action can be tracked with justification + rule code.
explain.executeAction: Execute converts this recommendation into an activity/task: backend calls `POST /api/customer360/{id}/actions/execute` and creates a new Activity record.
explain.noCohortData: Cohort data is not available yet due to insufficient order history.
explain.modelNote: Note: These scores are deterministic v1 and can be improved later with ERP collection data, quota/forecast signals, and ML models.

salesman360.title: Sales Representative 360
salesman360.subtitle: Sales representative overview
salesman360.error: An error occurred while loading the overview

analytics.error: Analytics data could not be loaded

INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.title: Increase activity cadence
INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.reason: Only 2 activities in the last 7 days.

explain.revenueQualityTitle: Scores are rule-based, calculated from the sales rep's last 12 months portfolio/order/activity performance, covering cohort, retention, RFM, LTV, churn, upsell and payment metrics.
explain.churnRisk: Portfolio Churn Risk is scored 0-100 based on active customers versus customers becoming inactive in the last 90 days.
explain.upsellPropensity: Upsell Propensity is scored 0-100 using order intensity, won quotations, and activity cadence signals.
explain.paymentBehavior: Payment Behavior currently uses proxy metrics; it becomes more accurate once direct ERP collection history is integrated.
explain.rfmSegment: RFM Segment classifies the portfolio by recency/frequency/monetary behavior.
explain.cohortRetentionTitle: Cohort Retention cohorts customers by first order month within the rep portfolio and shows monthly retention rates.
explain.recommendedActionsTitle: Recommended Actions recommend priority actions such as pipeline cleaning, activity increase and churn intervention. Each action can be tracked with justification + rule code.
explain.executeAction: Execute converts the recommendation into an activity/task: backend calls `POST /api/salesmen360/{userId}/actions/execute`.
explain.noCohortData: Cohort data is not available yet due to insufficient order history.
explain.modelNote: Note: Current scores are deterministic v1 and can be strengthened with quota/forecast/ML.
